judgment.summary: Fast-growing company with strong free cash flow but high valuation multiples and recent earnings contraction.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 15.4%; next earnings date 2026-05-06.
positives: Revenue growth 33.1% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $2.30B — healthy cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a high mean target of $245.99.
negatives: Trailing P/E 76.18x and Forward P/E 20.65x — valuation remains elevated.
Earnings growth YoY -6.1% and quarterly earnings growth -4.7% — recent profitability decline.
Analyst growth est, current Q -13.0% — near-term earnings contraction expected.
Beta 1.87 — stock exhibits higher volatility than the market.

news.paragraph: DoorDash (DASH) saw analyst commentary suggesting a better-than-feared Q1 performance, following a mention by Jim Cramer that did not include the company. The positive analyst note provides a near-term counterpoint to broader market sentiment, with the next earnings date approaching. Traders should consider the analyst's view on delivery performance against the backdrop of Cramer's broader market commentary.

headlines.title: Jim Cramer Says “No to Rocket Companies”
Susquehanna Says DoorDash (DASH) Delivered Better-Than-Feared Q1 Performance

examples.body: $DASH working an inverted head and shoulders
